# Contributing

Thanks for your interest in contributing to Cinnasole!

## Getting started

1. Clone this repository.
2. Download the latest `cinnasole.py` from `https://cinnasole.com/website/download`.
3. Place `cinnasole.py` in the repository directory.

## Editing Cinnasole

To edit the Python file, run:

```sh
python3 cinnasole.py --edit
```

This will open `cinnasole.py` in `nano`.

If you prefer, you can edit `cinnasole.py` with any text editor.

## Before opening a Pull Request

- Test your changes.
- Remove any personal API keys, tokens, or other sensitive information.
- Keep your changes focused on a single feature or fix.
- Write a clear description of what your PR changes.

Thank you for contributing!
